title: 28Pcs Deep Bolt Extractor Set, with 3/8" Drive, Ez Out Broken Bolt Remover Kit, Spark Plug Extractor Socket Set, Easy Out Stripped Lug Nut Removal Tool for Removing Rounded, Rusted Bolts, Nuts (Red)
features: 【EXCELLENT GRIP】: The internal thread reverse spiral flutes of the bolt extractor kit are designed to bite down to provide maximum gripping power. The more you rotate it, the tighter the grip will be, making it easier to not break or slide. It is suitable for easy removal of damaged, frozen, studs, rusted, rounded-off bolts, spark plugs, nuts, and screws.

【MULTIPLE SIZE RANGE】: Our lug nut removal tool kit includes a set of 13 extended bolt extractors and 13 standard bolt extractors in both SAE (inches) and metric (mm) sizes: 1/4", 5/16" (8mm), 3/8", 10mm, 7/16" (11mm), 12mm, 1/2", 13mm, 9/16" (14mm), 5/8" (16mm), 17mm, 11/16", and 3/4" (19mm), along with a 3/8-inch drive and punch pin.

【DEEP BOLT EXTRACTOR】: Featuring a 2.5-inch deep-well design, this bolt extractor set effortlessly accesses confined areas, navigates deep holes, and removes spark plugs, effectively overcoming the constraints of shorter tools and ensuring you’re equipped for any challenging, deeply embedded issue. It comes with a handy toolbox for easy storage and portability.

【STRONG AND DURABLE】: Each bolt extractor in the set is meticulously manufactured from high-hardness Cr-Mo steel and features a sandblasted finish, guaranteeing robust durability and superior corrosion resistance. The laser-etched size markings on this nut extractor socket set make it easy to identify and use each tool, improving work efficiency.

【Versatile Compatibility】: This bolt extractor is compatible with 3/8-inch square drivers and hex adapters and works seamlessly with hand, air, or power tools. It features a knockout pin for easy removal. Nuts, drain plugs, and broken or stuck bolts can be easily removed. Perfect for home and mechanic use, as well as home repairs, auto repairs, and mechanical maintenance.

【PREMIUM SERVICE】: We are dedicated to delivering the highest quality products and services to our customers. If you have any questions about our products, please reach out to us through Amazon, and our professional team will be happy to assist you!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Deep Bolt Extractors 2 Short Bolt Extractors Previous page Next page Each set undergoes strict testing to ensure safe and reliable use! Superior Connection Plum-shaped extractor inner special internal thread design, sharp fluted bite down the stripped nuts and bolts, providing excellent grip and torque Standard 3/8 Inch Drive Compatible with most hand ratchets, impact wrenches, pneumatic ratchets, and drills for easy and convenient use. CR-MO Steel Made from high-hardness chrome, this set offers superior durability and longevity, with each extractor laser-marked for easy identification. Ease of use and portability The bolt extractor kit includes a handy toolbox for easy storage and transport, allowing you to take your tools anywhere.
